---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem or gap would this address? What can't you do today, or
what's painful?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives considered

Approaches you've evaluated and why they don't fit.

## Out of scope

What this feature would *not* cover, to keep the discussion focused.
